name: nVidia Personal Cinema 1.0 — Aberdeen Lab Report
description: Aberdeen Group laboratory feedback report to nVidia management on 16 hours of hands-on testing of the Personal Cinema 1.0 kit (Compro GeForce2 MX 400 graphics card with VIVO breakout box) on a Dell 8100 running Windows XP. Evaluates graphics, TV tuner via WinDVR, DVD playback via WinDVD, Ulead Video Wave 4, and Microsoft Movie Maker workflows, and recommends packaging, cabling, and software-install improvements.
